global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with food images and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery services with an inviting message.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Food images
elements.description: Two stylized food images displayed in a minimalistic outline style, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Food images
elements.description: Another stylized food image, also in a minimalistic outline style, positioned next to the first two.

elements.label: Food image
elements.description: A single stylized food image in a minimalistic outline style, slightly overlapping with the others.

elements.label: Food image
elements.description: A stylized food image in a minimalistic outline style, positioned below the other food images.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Hungry? We got you' on a soft orange background.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Frer D Start now

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: A small logo with the text 'CraveLoop' in a modern font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: UGC badge
elements.description: A small badge labeled 'UGC' in a simple font, positioned at the top left near the logo.
